---
title: "AI Home"
format: html
---

# AI Presentations

This is the landing page for ETDD's AI Presentations. Click on one of the links below to see that presentation.

Each of these presentations has additional accessibility options- press the `A` key to open the accessibility menu.

## AI 101 and AI Policy
This is the training all ETDD staff receive

[Presentation Version](AI101/AI101NoNotes.qmd)

[With Notes](AI101/AI101WithNotes.qmd)

## AI Policy Writing 101
This presentation was given at the state-wide conference for development districts in 2026

[Presentation Version](AIPolicyWriting/AIPolicyWritingNoNotes.qmd)

[With Minimal Increments](AIPolicyWriting/AIPolicyWritingNonIncremental.qmd)

[With Notes](AIPolicyWriting/AIPolicyWritingWithNotes.qmd)
